title: Virtual learning sessions for international students – Pathways to permanent residence - Canada.ca
content:
## Virtual learning sessions for international students – Pathways to permanent residence
We’re offering a virtual questions and answers series for international students who want to stay in Canada after they graduate.

## Learn about pathways to permanent residence in Canada
Each 1-hour session will allow international students to ask questions about future pathways to permanent residence in Canada.
To prepare for these sessions, students should watch the related video before they register.
Watch the introduction video.
Students can register for one or more sessions. No case-specific questions will be answered during these sessions.
